category_sources: Official README describes IRRToolSet as tools for Internet Routing Registry routing-policy work.
source_facts.description says it provides tools to work with Internet routing policies.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README and release naming use IRRToolSet.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the best available project documentation surface and includes overview and installation notes.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/irrtoolset/irrtoolset; per instruction repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official README says policies are stored in IRR using Routing Policy Specification Language and are useful for network engineers.
source_facts.executables lists routing-policy tools peval, rpslcheck, and rtconfig.
